meaning: adj.抑制性的,制止的,遏抑的
examples: Water is a natural appetite suppressant.
They are also a fantastic appetite suppressant.
Leptin ACTS like a natural appetite suppressant.
One firefighter suffered minor injuries from exposure to a fire suppressant, he added.
Redux, its appetite-suppressant, was pulled from the pharmacy shelves last year after tests suggested that it might cause fatal heart defects.
